# Leadership Delta — Tools

Tools for closing the Leadership Delta — the gap between current leadership capability and what AI-era leadership demands. Most assess the conditions that enable leadership behavior change, not the leader in isolation.

## Live tools

These are built and available now. Click any to take the diagnostic.

### Personal Context Passport

Portable, auditable AI context artifact. A guided interview produces downloadable Markdown, JSON, and an agent brief. Browser-only, no data stored in v0.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/personal-context-passport)**

`ai-tool` · Structured self-authored artifact · Not psychometric · v0.1 · *Active Modeling*
---
### Creative Climate Diagnostic (Ekvall)

20 questions, 10 dimensions.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/creative-climate)**

`diagnostic` · Research-grounded · Ekvall (1996) · Instrument validation pending · v0.3 · *Creative Cultivation*
---
### RIST Trust Diagnostic

32 questions. Over/under-trust detection.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/rist-trust)**

`diagnostic` · Research-grounded · Original operationalization · Construct validation planned · v0.3 · *Trust Calibration*
---
### Causal Loop Diagram Builder

Map feedback loops. R and B loops auto-detected.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/causal-loop)**

`interactive-tool` · Systems thinking tool · Meadows (2008) · Educational / exploratory · *Systems Orchestration*
---
### Leadership Delta Scoresheet

Score one or up to 4 leadership teams across 7 Leadership Delta dimensions — 3 indicators each, 1-5 scale, total 105. Produces radar chart overlay, dimension bar chart, heat map, and downloadable reports per team plus cross-team comparison. Browser-only, no data stored.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/leadership-delta-scoresheet)**

`ai-tool` · Consultant-grade diagnostic · AI Leadership Delta™ · Original — Gibbons 2026 · v0.1 · *Adaptive Adoption*
---

## In development

Active build, not yet visible on the live site.

- **Scenario Planning Canvas** — 2×2 uncertainty matrix for AI futures. *(`canvas`, Strategic Imagination)*
- **Bureaucracy Buster Scorecard** — How many approvals to pilot an AI tool? *(`assessment`, Friction Courage)*
- **Stakeholder Trust Map** — Who trusts the initiative? Heat-mapped. *(`interactive-tool`, Trust Calibration)*
- **Influence Network Heatmap** — Formal vs informal power. Heat-mapped. *(`interactive-tool`, Systems Orchestration)*

## Long list

Tools we intend to build (planned) or are evaluating (speculative). See the [full long list](/tools/long-list/) for cross-domain view.

- **Future-Back Strategy Template** — Start from 2028, work backward. *(planned · Strategic Imagination)*
- **Modeling Behavior Gap Analysis** — Behaviors you want vs. behaviors you demonstrate. *(planned · Active Modeling)*
- **From GTD to GSD — The AI Productivity System** — GTD reimagined for humans managing AI agents. *(planned · Active Modeling)*
- **Build Your Chief of Staff in Cowork** — Step-by-step guide to creating a CoS agent. *(planned · Active Modeling)*
- **Innovation Blockers Diagnostic** — What's killing innovation? *(planned · Creative Cultivation)*
- **Permission-to-Fail Assessment** — How your org handles failure: punish, ignore, tolerate, or celebrate? *(planned · Friction Courage)*
- **Trust Repair Protocol** — Step-by-step repair after a trust breach. *(planned · Trust Calibration)*
- **Ethical Leadership Self-Assessment** — Do you model ethical AI use? *(planned · Ethical Stewardship)*
- **Feedback Loop Identifier** — Find reinforcing and balancing loops in your adoption system. *(planned · Systems Orchestration)*
- **Polarity Map for AI Adoption** — Tensions that can't be solved, only managed. *(planned · Systems Orchestration)*
- **Conditions Audit** — Diagnostic assessing whether the six organisational conditions necessary for the Leadership Delta to close are present. Sponsorship, reinforcement, structural enablers, peer norms, time/space, consequence alignment. *(planned · cross-pillar)*
- *AI Opportunity Scanner* — Process-by-process: where could AI create value? *(speculative · Strategic Imagination)*
- *Leader-Team AI Alignment Check* — Perception gap: does the team see the leader's AI stance the way the leader does? *(speculative · Active Modeling)*
- *Experimentation Permission Audit* — Do people feel permission to experiment with AI? *(speculative · Creative Cultivation)*
- *Values-AI Alignment Audit* — Map stated values against AI practices. *(speculative · Ethical Stewardship)*
- *Stakeholder Network Analyzer* — Identify brokers, bottlenecks, isolated clusters. *(speculative · Systems Orchestration)*
